summary: Adjusted the opening handoff to mark the time jump more clearly and avoid echoing Chapter 16's city-noise exit too closely. The dinner scene and closing beat already preserved the required continuity and remained unchanged.
edits: Reframed the opening sentences around the March time jump so the chapter enters on a distinct temporal beat instead of feeling like an immediate continuation of Chapter 16's street-level thought chorus.
Kept the existing closing movement intact because it already lands on Anya's own thoughts rather than repeating the prior chapter's Damian-facing exit.
